ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "syntype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the syntype */,
  "agecat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age category */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_agecat_id FOREIGN KEY ("agecat_id") REFERENCES age_categories ("agecat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_syntype_id FOREIGN KEY ("syntype_id") REFERENCES syntypes ("syntype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the health study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screenings" (
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* ID of the study */,
  "predexfd6" INTEGER /* Predicted index for the patient */,
  "n_cell" INTEGER /* Number of cells observed */,
  "screening_date" TEXT /* Date when the screening was conducted */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the screening record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the screening record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenings_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenings_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenings_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES screening_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostics" (
  "diagnostic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Outcome of the diagnosis */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnostic_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnostic was conducted */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnostic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnostic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnostic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "agecat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "agecat_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agecat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syntypes" (
  "syntype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syntype */,
  "syntype_name" TEXT /* Name of the syntype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the syntype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the syntype record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the syntype record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syntype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the screening method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the screening method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the screening method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the screening method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnostic method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnostic method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnostic method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country where the provider is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the healthcare provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the healthcare provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* ID of the study */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was enrolled in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening result */,
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the screening */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the screening result was determined */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the screening result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the screening result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_results_screening_id FOREIGN KEY ("screening_id") REFERENCES screenings ("screening_id")
)
